mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.address, u.avatar, u.role, u.status, u.school_id AS schoolId,
CASE WHEN #{language} = 'ko' THEN s.name_ko WHEN #{language} = 'en' THEN s.name_en ELSE s.name_zh END AS schoolName,
CASE WHEN #{language} = 'ko' THEN s.city_ko WHEN #{language} = 'en' THEN s.city_en ELSE s.city_zh END AS cityName,
u.credit_score AS creditScore, u.create_time AS createTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = u.id) AS productCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0 AND seller_id = u.id) AS orderCount
FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN school s ON u.school_id = s.id WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.name_ko LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
AND u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND u.school_id = #{schoolId}
AND u.status = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'normal' THEN 1 WHEN #{status} = 'banned' THEN 0 ELSE u.status END
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
